tools.Name: MetaGPT
tools.Description: A multi-agent framework that simulates a software company by assigning specific roles (product managers, architects, engineers) to LLMs.
tools.Use_Case: Automating the software development process from requirement analysis to code generation.

tools.Name: MLX-Audio
tools.Description: An audio processing library built for Apple Silicon, offering efficient text-to-speech, speech-to-text, and speech-to-speech capabilities.
tools.Use_Case: Performing fast, local audio analysis and synthesis on M-series Mac hardware.

tools.Name: Hindsight
tools.Description: An agent memory system designed for learning over time rather than just recalling conversation history, utilizing biomimetic data structures.
tools.Use_Case: Enabling AI agents to develop long-term understanding, retain knowledge, and build mental models in production environments.
